title: astragalus cajamarcanus
intro: Astragalus cajamarcanus, also known as Cajamarquilla milkvetch or cajamarquilla, is a species of legume in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Peruvian medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cajamarcanus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus cajamarcanus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
